dict.source: Make.md requires inline titles to be enabled to show folder titles, hence this toggle exists to disable it on notes elsewhere.
dict.target: Make.md 需要启用内联标题才能显示文件夹标题，因此提供此开关以在其他笔记中禁用它。

dict.source: Minimal Cards is a feature of [Minimal](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal). AnuPpuccin does not come compiled with the snippet, however you can use a compiled version with this theme.
dict.target: 极简卡片是 [Minimal](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal) 的一项功能。AnuPpuccin 主题未编译包含该代码片段，但您可以在使用此主题时使用已编译好的版本。

dict.source: Download the snippet from [kepano](https://github.com/kepano/)'s github via [this link](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal/blob/master/src/scss/features/cards.scss).
dict.target: 请通过 [此链接](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal/blob/master/src/scss/features/cards.scss) 从 [kepano](https://github.com/kepano/) 的 GitHub 下载该代码片段。
